## 💡 About Me

```javascript
const swshadows = {
  nicknames: ["Joe", "Shadow"],
  birthDate: "Sep 10 2000",
  interests: {
    professional: ["algorithms", "fullstack_dev", "game_dev"],
    personal: ["gaming", "art", "design", "music", "animes", "organization"],
  },
};

console.log(swshadows);
```
